### Original Description
OpenClaw versions 2026.4.10 before 2026.4.14 fail to persist session context during delivery queue recovery for media replay. Attackers can exploit recovered queued outbound media to bypass group tool policy enforcement and weaken channel media restrictions after service restart or recovery.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-82rm-qcfx-2v78", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-12T16:18:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rm-qcfx-2v78", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-82rm-qcfx-2v78"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T20:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:31:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-r77c-2cmr-7p47", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43583", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/48aae82bbc19ba8b0741e61a08063eb0d1df464e", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-loss-of-group-tool-policy-context-in-delivery-queue-recovery", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rm-qcfx-2v78"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Delivery queue recovery could lose group tool-policy context for media replay", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T16:18:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rm-qcfx-2v78", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.10, < 2026.4.14"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-12T16:18:04Z"}
